text.title: Trajectory Eval Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observed regression class to the eval action to take. Leaves reference rules from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Which axis regressed vs baseline by > 25%?

conclusion.verdict: block PR; investigate LLM-as-judge disagreement; check ground-truth drift

branch.question: Does the trace contain loops (same tool, same args, ≥3 times)?

conclusion.verdict: block PR; missing tool description or stale tool response — check tool catalog
block PR; investigate added/removed tools that increased path length
block PR; prompt prefix changed → cache miss; restore stable prefix or accept rebuild
block PR; tool output verbosity grew → terse-default-tool-output methodology required
pass; record new baseline if improvement persists 3 runs

text.example: resources=0.42 (baseline 0.85) → q-cache-hit: cache_read_ratio dropped from 65% to 30% → otel-genai-semconv; rollback the prompt change that broke cache prefix.
